plugins.name: sommelier
plugins.description: Verification-gated orchestration skills (PRD + file-scoped parallel tickets, tier-paired, evidence-gated). Self-tested across five rounds, all published: verification rule beats placebo at catching certified bugs (0%->44-58%, hidden-pytest, p<=1e-4); tier-routing ~19% cheaper than all-Opus; parallel ~1.8x slower on small tasks.
